title: The Trial
description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

“Entrant [blue]a random number[/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today’s [gold]Trial[/gold].”

options.title: Accept
options.description: Serve as today’s Decider. Leads to a randomly selected trial.

options.title: Reject
options.description: [red]You are not allowed to Reject.[/red] Opens a second prompt warning of lethal punishment.

options.title: Double Down
options.description: [red]Face lethal repercussions.[/red] Deals [red]9999[/red] damage (effectively instant death). Shown only after choosing Reject.

notes:
This is a multi-stage event. Choosing [gold]Reject[/gold] on the initial screen leads to a second page where the [gold]Grand Arbiter[/gold] threatens death for refusal. From there you can still [gold]Accept[/gold] (give in) or [red]Double Down[/red] — [red]Double Down[/red] deals [red]9999[/red] damage (instant death) and shows an abandon-run confirmation dialog.

After [gold]Accepting[/gold] (from either screen), one of three trial scenarios is chosen at random ([blue]1 in 3[/blue] each):

[gold]The Merchant[/gold] — accused of murder; evidence is thin. [red]Guilty[/red]: Add [red]Regret[/red] to deck, gain [blue]2[/blue] random relics. [green]Innocent[/green]: Add [red]Shame[/red] to deck, upgrade [blue]2[/blue] cards.

[gold]The Noble[/gold] — charged with corruption; slips you a bribe note. [red]Guilty[/red]: Heal [green]10[/green] HP. [green]Innocent[/green]: Add [red]Regret[/red] to deck, gain [blue]300[/blue] gold.

[gold]The Nondescript Woman[/gold] — charged with theft and con-artistry; both sides compelling. [red]Guilty[/red]: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to deck, gain [blue]2[/blue] card rewards. [green]Innocent[/green]: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to deck, transform [blue]2[/blue] cards.

The entrant number in the flavor text is randomly chosen between [blue]101[/blue] and [blue]999[/blue] when the event is generated. The [blue]2[/blue] random relics from the Merchant Guilty outcome are drawn from the front of your character’s relic pool.
